privileged_info_summary: The task uses NOSH ChartingSystem, a real open-source EHR system designed for doctors and patients (available at https://github.com/shihjay2/nosh2). The environment runs via Docker with MariaDB 10.11 as the database and is accessible at http://localhost/login. Admin credentials are: username 'admin' with password 'Admin1234!', and the practice is named 'Hillside Family Medicine'. The task requires creating a new provider account 'dr.rodriguez' with password 'Provider2024!' and the 'provider' role. The patient data is synthetic, generated by Synthea (MITRE's open-source synthetic patient generator) from a Massachusetts cohort, with 20 pre-loaded patients. The verifier is a stub that always returns success; actual verification is performed externally via VLM evaluation.
